body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif; background: #1a1a2e; color: #ffffff; padding: 20px;
container: width: auto; max-width: 800px; background: #1a1a2e; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
title: padding: 16px 20px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 2px solid #4a5568;
th: background: #0f3460; color: #e94560; padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px;
td: padding: 10px 16px; font-size: 13px; border-bottom: 1px solid #4a5568; white-space: pre-wrap;
